title: Add the ability to set the group for an item in monday when syncing from Jira
excerpt: When syncing items from Jira to monday, it does not seem to be possible to set the group in monday. You can set it so that only items in a specific group in monday are synced to Jira, but when syncing from Jira you canno…

posts.author: steveg (Steve Glick)
posts.cookedHtml: When syncing items from Jira to monday, it does not seem to be possible to set the group in monday. You can set it so that only items in a specific group in monday are synced to Jira, but when syncing from Jira you cannot specify the group that items are created in.
